documentation_impact.rationale: The patch changes governed repository structure, Cursor rule behavior, compliance-hook behavior, normative documentation, tests, and backlog state.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The patch preserves no-push behavior, keeps governed structural changes local, emits compliance artifacts under work/<day>/<task-id>/, and keeps documentation-impact accounting explicit.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The patch improves reference stewardship by aligning live work-path placeholders with the ratified timestamp-naming shape and by adding regression tests for the convention.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The patch preserves the PRD pipeline workspace model while aligning current references with the three-level work/<day>/<task-id>/ layout and strengthening compliance-run coverage.
